thesis_summary: Structural bull case (inelastic supply, high central-bank buying, safe-haven bid) is largely priced; macro mixed and positioning crowded, so hold the core hedge but do not add.
key_risks: Rising real yields / firmer USD unwind the crowded long
Hawkish rate surprise (higher-for-longer) lifts 10y real yields
relative_view: Gold is a macro/monetary hedge with a comfortable buffer; a crowded long caps the case for adding vs a fresher, weather/policy-driven exposure like sugar.
